arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact flow.

contact_flow_id.description: The unique identifier of the contact flow.

content.description: The content of the contact flow, typically in JSON format.

description.description: A brief description of the contact flow.

id.description: The ID of the contact flow resource.

name.description: The name of the contact flow.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the contact flow.
